final:
module RefModule(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire si,
    output reg [7:0] q
    );

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        q <= 8'b00000000;
    end else begin
        q <= {q[6:0], si};
    end
end

endmodule
